name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_FUNCTION_3Y
description: New target pairs by functional category last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year, max_year
WHERE first_year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year
ORDER BY first_year DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: Among target pairs related to the Immune_Cell_Trafficking_Target category, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
Among target pairs related to the Chemokine_Trafficking_Pathway_Target category, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
Among target pairs related to the Complement_Pathway_Target category, which ones were first disclosed in the last three years?
